meta.title: Human Scale Data
meta.description: Cloud-native geospatial makes global climate data work for local decisions.

hero.title: data, where the people are.
hero.body: Cloud-native geospatial makes global climate data work for local decisions. We build it open, in public, with the cities that need it most.
hero.caption: belgrano, buenos aires

practice.label: 01 · what · who · why
practice.title: A practice, not a platform.
practice.body: We work alongside city teams to translate global open data into local decisions. The output is an analysis, a plan, and code anyone can rerun — not a subscription.
practice.p1Title: Open climate analyses cities can act on.
practice.p1Body: Heat, flooding, biodiversity, urban growth — assessments produced with municipalities, not for them. Code, data, and methodology open by default.
practice.p2Title: Municipal staff who plan for the next storm.
practice.p2Body: Sustainability leads, planners, GIS analysts in cities with urgent risk and modest budgets — and the local NGOs who work alongside them.
practice.p3Body: Cloud-native geospatial means a Pergamino-sized city can run analyses that used to require a national agency. We translate that reality into local practice.

pilots.label: 02 · pilots
pilots.title: Where we've worked.
pilots.body: Six cities so far. Each one a year-long engagement: listen, build, hand it over open.

method.label: 03 · method
method.title: How it works.
method.body: Four phases, one year. We embed with city teams, build open tools, and leave capacity behind.
method.s1Body: Two months on the ground. We map stakeholders, walk the neighborhoods, and understand what decisions the data needs to support.
method.s2Body: Four months co-creating. Jupyter notebooks, cloud pipelines, dashboards — all open source, all versioned, all reproducible.
method.s3Body: Two months piloting. Real users, real feedback, real iteration. We fix what breaks.
method.s4Body: Four months training. Local staff run the stack. We stay on call but step back.

initiatives.label: 04 · initiatives
initiatives.title: Beyond pilots.
initiatives.body: Longer-term programs that scale insights across regions and themes.

collaborators.label: 05 · collaborators
collaborators.title: Who we work with.
collaborators.body: We partner with cities, research institutions, and NGOs committed to open climate action.

cta.title: We'd love to hear from you.
cta.newsBody: Monthly field notes from the pilots. No spam, just updates.
